heading: Retention of combat uniforms by members deployed in support of contingency operations
label: 2568 Retention of combat uniforms by members deployed in support of contingency operations
text: The Secretary of a military department may authorize a member of the armed forces under the jurisdiction of the Secretary who has been deployed in support of a contingency operation for at least 30 days to retain, after that member is no longer so deployed, the combat uniform issued to that member as organizational clothing and individual equipment.
